rejected.one_liner: Change primary metric from MAPE to log-MAE.
rejected.reason: Evaluation contract and comparability contract fix the primary metric as held_out_mape_predicted_runtime_ms; changing it would break comparability.

deferred.reason: Useful fallback if pure analytical terms fail, but risks non-interpretable terms that violate the white-box constraint; defer until after C1 ablations.

deferred.one_liner: Synthetic B200 microbenchmark suite for constant calibration.
deferred.reason: High value for future reproducibility but not needed for the first falsifiable hypothesis; can be built in parallel during experiment.

folded.one_liner: NCU counter trend collection and bottleneck classifier.
folded.reason: Folded into C1 as validation instrumentation; not a separate route.

summary: Rejected and deferred ideas for the FlashAttention-4 B200 runtime model idea pass.
title: Rejected and Deferred Ideas: FlashAttention-4 B200 Runtime Model Idea Pass
